---
title: "historic districts cleaning version 2 part 2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# Packages
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
# Importing pre-cleaned data
historic_districts <- read_csv("../data/Historic Districts/historic_districts_clean3_specific_addresses.csv")
```
```{r}
# Removing unnecessary columns
# And making the address more human-readable
historic_districts <- historic_districts %>% 
  select(-nhl_designated_date, -prefix, -park_name) %>% # 99% NA, 85% NA, 98% NA
  mutate(address = paste(property_name, city, state, sep = ", "))
```

## Widening

```{r}
# split at ; 
```


## Fixing the NA locations
```{r}
# Getting the simpler addresses + renaming these cols
```
